reasoning: The question asks if Kateryna Lagno's Elo rating on the Wikipedia page for 'FIDE rankings' will be at least 1% higher on 2026-03-22 than it was on 2026-03-15. FIDE publishes its official rating lists on the 1st of every month, and the Wikipedia page is updated accordingly to reflect these new lists. Consequently, the rating displayed on Wikipedia for Kateryna Lagno will remain constant throughout the month of March (specifically, showing her 1 March 2026 rating of 2508). Since there are no new FIDE publications between March 15 and March 22, the value on the Wikipedia page will not change. Therefore, it is virtually impossible for her rating to be 1% (approx. 25.08 points) higher on March 22 compared to March 15.
